title: SCBE dataset purpose buckets and regularization policy
core_rule: Do not flat-merge all corpora. Merge inside purpose buckets, dedupe inside the bucket, keep eval and holdout frozen, and promote each bucket through its own gate.

coding_model.purpose: Build the coding model first: code primaries, binary transport, GeoSeal command recall, music-theory harmony, atomic workflow, and verified coding lane contracts.
coding_model.eval_gate: coding_system_industry_benchmark plus frozen Stage 6 eval contract
coding_model.promotion_rule: Promote only when coding lane benchmark passes and held-out Stage 6 prompts remain compliant.

aligned_foundations.purpose: Preserve shared substrate across math, English, Sacred Tongues, binary packet framing, chemistry-structure templates, and coding lanes.
aligned_foundations.eval_gate: cross-lane concept preservation and packet compliance
aligned_foundations.promotion_rule: Promote only if a concept survives representation transfer without collapsing lane boundaries.

operator_agent_bus.purpose: Teach runnable CLI/operator behavior: command recall, Apollo collection, browser/operator traces, cash sprint state, and agent bus routing.
operator_agent_bus.eval_gate: CLI command recall and governed route smoke tests
operator_agent_bus.promotion_rule: Promote only when exact commands run or fail closed with an auditable reason.

governance_security.purpose: Teach governance, route decisions, null-space confidence, code governance, PQC/hyperbolic controls, and adversarial rejection.
governance_security.eval_gate: governance decision and invalid-input regression tests
governance_security.promotion_rule: Promote only after anomaly audit and boundary/invalid-input tests pass.

commerce_product.purpose: Teach revenue workflows separately from the coding core: offers, checkout, fulfillment, tax, Gumroad, Stripe, and funnel operations.
commerce_product.eval_gate: checkout and fulfillment workflow smoke tests
commerce_product.promotion_rule: Promote only after secret sweep and live/test payment-mode separation.

research_bridge.purpose: Teach source-grounded research extraction, paper/video claims, and citation-backed technical synthesis.
research_bridge.promotion_rule: Promote only when records include source identity and falsifiable claim text.

story_lore.purpose: Teach Aethermoor/Spiralverse lore and style without contaminating the coding model unless records are explicit lore-code paired examples.
story_lore.eval_gate: style and canon eval, not coding eval
story_lore.promotion_rule: Never merge into coding_model unless the record has an explicit code-primary pair and passes code-lane validation.

uncategorized.purpose: Quarantine for files that need classification before any training run.
uncategorized.promotion_rule: No training use until classified and schema-adapted.

regularization_steps: Inventory local, Kaggle, Hugging Face, and cloud-synced surfaces before training.
Resolve Git LFS pointer files with git lfs pull or remote recovery before counting them as training data.
Normalize every trainable record to messages plus metadata, or instruction/response plus metadata.
Add source_path, source_sha256, dataset_family, purpose, split, quality, stage, and dedupe_key metadata.
Deduplicate exact text inside each purpose bucket before any weighted merge.
Freeze eval and holdout splits by source or concept; do not randomly split across duplicate source families.
Run anomaly/secret audit before upload to Hugging Face, Kaggle, or Colab.
Train staged mixtures instead of one mega corpus: seed, command harmony, binary/token transport, coding primaries, agentic tool loops, then verifier/RL-style tasks.

frontier_model_lessons.deepseek_v3: Use staged high-quality data plus SFT/RL and stable training instrumentation; architecture efficiency does not replace curation.
frontier_model_lessons.deepseek_r1: Use verifiable reward tasks for math/code/STEM and distill validated reasoning patterns after they pass objective checks.
frontier_model_lessons.kimi_k2: Use large-scale agentic data synthesis and environment interaction for coding-agent behavior rather than static completion data alone.
